---
title: "YUEYU TIAN"
---

::: {data-aos="fade-up"}
# 🧑‍🚀 Space Crew: YUEYU TIAN

**Faculty:** \[ICDI\] *(Notice: Student ID strictly hidden)*
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::::::: columns
::: {.column width="48%" data-aos="fade-right"}
### 📸 Solo at NARIT (1pt)

![](images/clipboard-642675068.jpeg){.rounded}
:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

:::: {.column width="48%" data-aos="fade-left"}
### 🎥 Personal Vlog (1pt)


::: {.ratio .ratio-16x9 style="border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden;"}
<iframe
  src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/oQcL7oWRV_0"
  title="NARIT Shorts"
  frameborder="0"
  allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share"
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
:::
::::
:::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: {data-aos="fade-up"}
### 💭 Personal Impressions (1pt)

Visiting NARIT felt like stepping into a space where science becomes alive and immersive. The planetarium experience, interactive exhibits, and astronomical displays made complex concepts feel accessible and exciting. Instead of just reading about space, I was able to experience it visually and emotionally, which made the visit both inspiring and memorable.

### 💡 Knowledge Gained (1pt)

Through this visit, I learned how planetarium projection systems simulate celestial movements and recreate realistic night skies. I also gained a deeper understanding of black holes, light spectra, and how telescopes collect and analyze data from distant galaxies. The integration of technology and science communication was particularly impressive.

### 🚀 Future Applications (1pt)

This experience showed me how scientific knowledge can be transformed into engaging educational content. In the future, I can apply these insights to improve presentation skills, integrate interactive elements into projects, and develop more experience-based learning approaches within my field.
:::
